note: Content Access adds role-based view/edit/delete node access per content type and optionally per node (and per user via ACL), on top of core node grants. Cases are `recipe` (response-graded) — they probe documented facts an agent would otherwise read source to answer; no site mutation.

evals.prompt: On Drupal 11 with Content Access enabled, where do I set the default view/edit/delete access by role for a whole content type? Give the tab/path.
evals.expected_output: On the content type's 'Access control' tab at /admin/structure/types/manage/{type}/access (ContentAccessAdminSettingsForm); requires 'bypass node access' + 'administer content types'.

evals.prompt: I want to override content access on one specific node instead of the whole content type. How do I enable and reach a node's own access settings?
evals.expected_output: Enable 'Per content node access control' (per_node) on the content type; each node then gets an 'Access control' tab at /node/{node}/access to override the type defaults.

evals.prompt: Which access operations can Content Access control per role, and which ones are the new permissions it adds versus reused core permissions?
evals.expected_output: view (any), view own, update/edit (any + own), delete (any + own). The two 'view' operations are new; edit/delete map to core edit/delete any/own {type} content permissions.

evals.prompt: How does Content Access integrate with Drupal's node access grants system, and what grant realms does it write?
evals.expected_output: It implements hook_node_grants() and hook_node_access_records(), writing grants in the realms content_access_roles (role grants) and content_access_author (author grants); grants are optimized so only those differing from core permissions are stored.

evals.prompt: I need to grant view/edit/delete on a single node to specific named users (not roles) with Content Access. What do I need?
evals.expected_output: Enable the contributed ACL module and turn on per-node access for the type; the node's Access control tab then shows a 'User access control lists' section to grant view/edit/delete to specific users.

evals.prompt: Which Content Access permission lets an editor manage the per-node access tab for any node, and which one restricts them to their own nodes?
evals.expected_output: 'grant content access' gates the per-node tab for any node; 'grant own content access' restricts it to the user's own nodes.

evals.prompt: In PHP, how do I read a content type's Content Access view-role settings and save updated settings programmatically?
evals.expected_output: content_access_get_settings('view', $type) reads a setting; content_access_set_settings($settings, $type) writes them (stored as node-type third-party settings).

evals.prompt: In a custom Drupal module I want to react when someone saves per-node Content Access settings. Which hook do I implement (current, non-deprecated)?
evals.expected_output: Implement hook_content_access_per_node(array $settings, NodeInterface $node); the older hook_per_node() is deprecated.
